description_long: This is a luxurious wristwatch featuring a gold-toned round case with a polished finish and a black textured strap that appears to be made of leather. The dial is gold with matching gold hour markers and hands, and it includes two subdials, likely for chronograph or additional timekeeping functions. The watch face is adorned with a small, distinct brand logo positioned just below the 12 o'clock marker. The side view reveals two pushers and a crown, indicating chronograph functionality. The strap has a visible grain pattern and a traditional buckle closure, with the inner side lined in a lighter, natural leather color. The overall design is elegant and modern, suitable for both formal and urban casual wear.
description: A gold-toned wristwatch with a black textured leather strap, gold dial, and chronograph subdials, featuring a prominent brand logo below 12 o'clock. The design is sleek and sophisticated, with polished metal and detailed strap work.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gold dial, gold hour markers, two subdials, and a brand logo below 12 o'clock, with the black strap visible at the top and bottom.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the gold case, the crown, and two pushers on the right side, as well as the textured black strap and tan leather lining.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the black textured strap and gold buckle, with the back of the watch case partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the smooth gold case profile and the continuous black strap with tan leather lining, no visible pushers or crown.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, stylized emblem or crest is present just below the 12 o'clock marker on the dial, visually distinct and centrally positioned.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is gold with applied gold indices for hour markers, two subdials symmetrically placed, and slim gold hands. The design is chronograph style, with a clean, modern look and a polished finish. The subdials add functional and decorative complexity.
attribute_strap_type: Textured black leather strap with a visible grain pattern and a traditional buckle closure, lined with tan leather on the inside.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with three central hands (hour, minute, second) and two subdials, likely for chronograph or additional timekeeping functions. No visible date window or luminous elements.
